context: Tests whether the agent correctly declares a Dashboard Extension in the Saleor App manifest with the required fields, uses the app-bridge hooks from @saleor/app-sdk to communicate with the dashboard host, dispatches a Notification action, and documents the HTTPS and CORS production requirements.

checklist.name: extensions array in manifest
checklist.description: The AppManifest object in pages/api/manifest.ts contains an `extensions` array (not undefined or absent)

checklist.name: Extension mount point
checklist.description: The extension entry includes a `mount` property set to a valid Saleor dashboard mount point (e.g., PRODUCT_DETAILS_MORE_ACTIONS or similar PRODUCT_* mount)

checklist.name: Extension target field
checklist.description: The extension entry includes a `target` property (e.g., POPUP or APP_PAGE)

checklist.name: Extension permissions
checklist.description: The extension entry includes a `permissions` array containing at least one permission (e.g., MANAGE_PRODUCTS)

checklist.name: Extension URL from env
checklist.description: The extension `url` property is constructed using process.env.APP_URL (or equivalent env var) — not hardcoded

checklist.name: Notification dispatch
checklist.description: The extension page calls appBridge.dispatch(actions.Notification({ ... })) or appBridge?.dispatch(actions.Notification({ ... })) to send a notification to the dashboard

checklist.name: HTTPS requirement documented
checklist.description: README.md (or inline comments) explicitly states that the extension URL must be served over HTTPS in production

checklist.name: CORS requirement documented
checklist.description: README.md (or inline comments) explicitly states that the extension page must include Access-Control-Allow-Origin headers for the dashboard origin

checklist.name: createManifestHandler used
checklist.description: pages/api/manifest.ts exports a handler created with createManifestHandler from @saleor/app-sdk/handlers/next
